scripts.test: pnpm -C packages/utils test && pnpm -C packages/components test
scripts.build: pnpm -C packages/utils build && pnpm -C packages/components build && pnpm -C packages/zl-ui build && pnpm -C apps/docs build
scripts.build:libs: pnpm -C packages/utils build && pnpm -C packages/components build && pnpm -C packages/zl-ui build
scripts.build:docs: pnpm run build:libs && pnpm -C apps/docs build && cp -r apps/docs/.vitepress/dist dist
